name: NCBI BLAST
description: NCBI BLAST is a useful sequence analysis surface inside Biology.
whyUseIt: People in Biology use NCBI BLAST to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using NCBI BLAST as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from NCBI BLAST.
